name: Acintya
description: Acintya (from Sanskrit: अचिन्त्य, "the inconceivable", "the unimaginable"),[1][2] is a theological and symbolic concept in Indonesian Hinduism that expresses the ineffable nature a supreme divine principle in Indonesian Hindu theology. Acintya is conceptual and iconographic representation of the ultimate reality that lies beyond thought, form, and direct worship.
